title: Pack additive area overlays without overlap
description: Subgraph, zone, and boundary area overlays are packed together at render time so their visual regions do not overlap, including after expandable zone/subgraph components are collapsed or reopened.
decision_notes: The prior fix only prevented same-overlay zone boxes from overlapping; boundary boxes could still sit directly on top of zone boxes.

Area packing now runs in the common 2D render path for subgraph/zone/boundary groups when multiple area overlay kinds are active. Layer background boxes are excluded so Stack view keeps its layer semantics.
Because render() recomputes the effective model and layout on every abstraction collapse/expand, the packed area positions are recalculated at each interaction.
verification: dist demo seed check: overview with subgraph+zone+boundary gives overlaps=[]
dist demo seed check: overview with subgraph+zone+boundary and collapsed zone:gcp gives overlaps=[]
